claim: Kiro AI coding hackathon focuses on agentic coding workflows: steering documents, prompts/commands (markdown workflows), and devlogs (timeline + decisions + challenges)
actionable: Document your AI coding process with steering docs (global rules), prompt workflows, and development logs to improve reproducibility and learning
source_title: The Kiro AI Coding Hackathon has Officially Started

claim: Kiro CLI is the preferred interface for structured agentic coding; supports advanced features like tangent mode and MCP server integration
actionable: Use Kiro CLI over IDE for coding workflows; master tangent mode for focusing on sub-tasks and MCP integration for external tool access
source_title: The Kiro AI Coding Hackathon has Officially Started

claim: Building agents with quick-start templates reduces entry friction; good scaffolding for planning tools, sub-agents, file systems, and system prompts accelerates development
actionable: Create reusable starter templates for agent projects; include pre-built planning, file-system, and sub-agent patterns
source_title: The Kiro AI Coding Hackathon has Officially Started
